jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at 1mg - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
1mg invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Amritsar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About 1mg:
1mg is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 1mg!
